headline: Centene Housing Investment And New Leaders Aim To Steady Core Programs
summary: Centene subsidiary Health Net is committing $3 million to support affordable and supportive housing projects in the Sacramento region. Centene is also adding two new executive leadership roles aimed at strengthening oversight across Medicaid, Medicare, and commercial operations. For investors tracking NYSE:CNC, these moves come as the shares trade at $38.17, with a 5.6% return over the past 30 days and a 2.3% return over the past week. Over longer horizons, returns have been weaker,...
